assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — relay routing approves a direct route when the target peer is visible and strong
assertionResults.title: approves a direct route when the target peer is visible and strong

assertionResults.title: approves a relay route when the target is not directly visible

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — relay routing stores the packet for later when no peer is visible at all
assertionResults.title: stores the packet for later when no peer is visible at all

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — relay routing blocks a packet it has already seen (loop prevention)
assertionResults.title: blocks a packet it has already seen (loop prevention)

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — self-learning raises a peer's route score after successful deliveries
assertionResults.title: raises a peer's route score after successful deliveries

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — self-learning quarantines a peer whose trust collapses after repeated failures
assertionResults.title: quarantines a peer whose trust collapses after repeated failures

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — self-healing rehabilitates a quarantined peer once its cooldown has elapsed
assertionResults.title: rehabilitates a quarantined peer once its cooldown has elapsed

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — self-healing rehabilitates a struggling peer immediately on a recovering success
assertionResults.title: rehabilitates a struggling peer immediately on a recovering success

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — MauriAI traffic control spreads relay traffic across equally-strong peers under congestion
assertionResults.title: spreads relay traffic across equally-strong peers under congestion

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — state lifecycle removePeer purges the peer along with its quarantine and traffic state
assertionResults.title: removePeer purges the peer along with its quarantine and traffic state

assertionResults.fullName: SelfGovernanceRoutingEngine — state lifecycle does not strand quarantine state for peers that have been removed
assertionResults.title: does not strand quarantine state for peers that have been removed
